ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_assessment: Good quality, text-based PDF with clear text. All fields legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_assessment: Good quality, text-based PDF. All fields legible. Some areas have logo text 'MannTek'.

lc_check.lc_validation_steps: No LC-related terms (L/C, Letter of Credit, Documentary Credit, LC No., LC Number) found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-443262' does not contain any LC bank-term context. LC exception NOT activated.

search_results.location: Bottom of invoice, company identification block: 'Mann Teknik AB' with postal address Box126, SE-542 22 MARIESTAD, delivery address Strandvägen 16, SE-542 39 MARIESTAD, SWEDEN. Also present in header as 'MannTek' (logo/branding).

consignor_search_all_files.conclusion: Consignor name 'Mann Teknik AB' found explicitly in the invoice's company identification block at the bottom of page 1.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Mann Teknik AB' found explicitly in invoice company block (IV-003).
Consignee 'Kanon Liquid Handling' matches invoice Buyer field (IV-007).
pairing_validation.motivation: Two of three pairing criteria are met: consignor name matches and consignee name matches. Document pair is valid.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Mann Teknik AB, Strandvägen 16, SE542 39, MARIESTAD, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Mann Teknik AB, Postal address: Box126, SE-542 22 MARIESTAD, Delivery address: Strandvägen 16, SE-542 39 MARIESTAD, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Mann Teknik AB' anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: The name 'Mann Teknik AB' is found explicitly in the invoice's company identification block at the bottom of page 1 (IV-003). This is an exact match after normalization of case.
Country 'SWEDEN' explicitly stated in the invoice company block (IV-005). Additionally, VAT number prefix 'SE' (IV-006) confirms Sweden. Delivery address also states 'MARIESTAD, SWEDEN'.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice company block.
Land check – Sweden in certificate matches SWEDEN in invoice.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Mann Teknik AB' at Strandvägen 16, SE542 39, MARIESTAD, Sweden. Invoice issuer: 'Mann Teknik AB' at Box126, SE-542 22 MARIESTAD / Strandvägen 16, SE-542 39 MARIESTAD, SWEDEN. The company name 'Mann Teknik AB' is an exact match. The delivery address in the invoice (Strandvägen 16, SE-542 39 MARIESTAD) matches the certificate address. Country Sweden confirmed explicitly and via VAT prefix SE. Rule 4.1.0 satisfied – no further sequential testing needed.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Kanon Liquid Handling, Suite 4, Brookside Business C., Spring Road, Ibstock, Leicestershire LE67 6LR, United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
checkpoints.invoice_value: Kanon Liquid Handling, Suite 4, Brookside Business C., Spring Road, Ibstock, Leicestershire LE67 6LR, STORBRITANNIEN

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignee in primary invoicing field (Buyer).
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has a 'Buyer' field containing 'Kanon Liquid Handling, Suite 4, Brookside Business C., Spring Road, Ibstock, Leicestershire LE67 6LR, STORBRITANNIEN' (IV-007, IV-008). This is the primary invoicing field.
Certificate: 'Kanon Liquid Handling'. Invoice Buyer: 'Kanon Liquid Handling'. Exact match after normalization.

Certificate states 'United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland'. Invoice states 'STORBRITANNIEN' (Swedish for 'Great Britain'/'United Kingdom'). These are the same country – 'STORBRITANNIEN' is the Swedish name for the United Kingdom. Normalization of country names across languages is permitted under section 4.5.4 (full country name vs recognized short form). MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification – Buyer field is primary invoicing field.
Name verification – exact match 'Kanon Liquid Handling'.
Country verification – 'United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland' = 'STORBRITANNIEN' (Swedish for United Kingdom).

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Kanon Liquid Handling' at Suite 4, Brookside Business C., Spring Road, Ibstock, Leicestershire LE67 6LR, United Kingdom. Invoice Buyer: 'Kanon Liquid Handling' at Suite 4, Brookside Business C., Spring Road, Ibstock, Leicestershire LE67 6LR, STORBRITANNIEN. Company names are an exact match. Address details match exactly. Country: 'United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland' vs 'STORBRITANNIEN'. STORBRITANNIEN is the Swedish word for United Kingdom/Great Britain. This is a standard language normalization of country name (full English name vs Swedish name) which is permitted. MATCH on both name and country.

checkpoints.certificate_value:
One pallet of couplings
N6100D4401 Breakaway Ind. 6"-6" ANSI Cl. 150 SS FPM
checkpoints.invoice_value: 1 N6100D4401 84818099 BREAKAWAY IND. 6"- 6" ANSI Cl.150 SS FPM

comparison_steps.description: Certificate article number N6100D4401 checked against invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate article: 'N6100D4401' (CD-009). Invoice line 1 ART. NO: 'N6100D4401' (IV-010). Exact match.

Certificate: 'Breakaway Ind. 6"-6" ANSI Cl. 150 SS FPM'. Invoice: 'BREAKAWAY IND. 6"- 6" ANSI Cl.150 SS FPM'. After normalization of case and minor spacing, these are identical. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Breakaway Ind. 6"-6" ANSI Cl. 150 SS FPM' can be identified in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Article number verification – N6100D4401 exact match.
Controlled text matching – description matches after normalization of case and spacing.
Non-identity-bearing additions – 'One pallet of couplings' in certificate is a packaging/colloquial description; the identity-bearing designation matches.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Article number N6100D4401 in certificate exactly matches article number N6100D4401 in invoice line 1. Description 'Breakaway Ind. 6"-6" ANSI Cl. 150 SS FPM' matches 'BREAKAWAY IND. 6"- 6" ANSI Cl.150 SS FPM' after case normalization and minor spacing differences (space around dash, period placement in 'Cl.150' vs 'Cl. 150'). These are permitted normalizations. The certificate also says 'One pallet of couplings' which is a packaging/general description that is non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4. Both article number and description match.

comparison_steps.description: Check if numeric value 1 with unit PCS can be identified in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7: '1 pcs'. Invoice line 1 QUANT.: '1'. The numeric value 1 is identifiable in the invoice for the corresponding article N6100D4401. Per 4.4.3, the invoice does not need to state the same unit; it is sufficient that the numeric value can be identified. Additionally, the invoice states 'PACKAGES.....: 1 PCS' at the bottom (IV-015), further confirming 1 PCS.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that certificate specifies both numeric value and unit.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states '1 pcs' – both numeric value (1) and unit (pcs) are present.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check – numeric value 1 found in invoice quantity column for matching article.
Invoice need not state same unit – numeric value 1 identified in invoice.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '1 pcs'. Invoice line 1 for article N6100D4401 has QUANT. = 1. The numeric value matches exactly. The invoice also states 'PACKAGES.....: 1 PCS' confirming the package count. Per rule 4.4.3, the invoice does not need to state the same unit – the numeric value 1 is sufficient. MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Country of origin: Sweden / These products are of European Community preferential origin.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin declaration in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains explicit origin declaration: 'These products are of European Community preferential origin. Country of origin: Sweden' (IV-013, IV-014).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU (Sweden)'. Invoice states 'European Community preferential origin' and 'Country of origin: Sweden'.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate origin 'EU' is confirmed by invoice stating 'European Community preferential origin'. Certificate origin 'Sweden' is confirmed by invoice stating 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Both components verified.

comparison_steps.description: Sweden is an EU member state. EU ↔ Sweden interchange is verified.
comparison_steps.details: Sweden is EU-27 member. Certificate says 'EU (Sweden)' which is confirmed by invoice saying both 'European Community' and 'Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU (Sweden)' i.e. EU + one specific EU member state. Invoice has explicit EU origin statement.
comparison_steps.details: Rule 4.5.4.2.1 applies: certificate states EU combined with one specific EU member state (Sweden). Invoice contains explicit EU origin statement ('European Community preferential origin') AND explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Full confirmation. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice via 'Country of origin: Sweden' and 'European Community preferential origin'.
EU normalization – 'EU' in certificate matches 'European Community' in invoice.
EU member state – Sweden is EU member, confirmed in both documents.
Generellt EU-ursprungsuttalande covers 'EU (Sweden)' – invoice confirms both EU origin and Sweden.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'EU (Sweden)'. Invoice origin declaration: 'These products are of European Community preferential origin. Country of origin: Sweden'. The certificate claims EU origin with Sweden specified. The invoice explicitly confirms both: (1) 'European Community preferential origin' confirms EU, and (2) 'Country of origin: Sweden' confirms Sweden. This is a full confirmation per 4.5.4.2.1 – certificate states EU + one EU member state, invoice confirms EU origin and names Sweden. No contradicting origins in invoice. No non-EU origins found. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: NOT_APPLICABLE – No LC reference found in certificate.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Document pairing – two files received, certificate identified in Document A, invoice in Document B.
Pairing validation sanity check – consignor and consignee both identifiable in invoice.
Koncernstruktur – consignor 'Mann Teknik AB' found explicitly in invoice company block.
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – no need to proceed to 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country check for consignor – Sweden matches.
Consignee priority identification – Buyer field is primary.
Article number verification – N6100D4401 exact match.
Text matching – description matches after normalization.
Quantity occurrence check – value 1 found in invoice.
EU normalization – EU confirmed via European Community in invoice.
EU member state – Sweden is EU member, confirmed.
Generellt EU-ursprungsuttalande – invoice confirms EU + Sweden.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Mann Teknik AB, mottagaren Kanon Liquid Handling, varubeskrivningen (N6100D4401 Breakaway Ind. 6"-6" ANSI Cl. 150 SS FPM), kvantiteten (1 pcs) och ursprungslandet EU (Sweden) kan samtliga verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Consignor Mann Teknik AB found in invoice company block. Consignee Kanon Liquid Handling matches Buyer field. Article N6100D4401 with matching description confirmed. Quantity 1 pcs verified. Origin EU (Sweden) confirmed by invoice origin declaration.
non_blocking_observations: Invoice is in mixed English/Swedish (country name 'STORBRITANNIEN' is Swedish for United Kingdom) – handled via language normalization.

Certificate consignor address uses SE542 39 MARIESTAD while invoice postal address uses SE-542 22 MARIESTAD and delivery address SE-542 39 MARIESTAD – address variations do not affect consignor verification per rules.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW found. Consistency verified: all motivations support MATCH conclusions. Overall result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH.
